description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of brown brick and white trim on the exterior. The front facade includes a driveway with two parked cars, a covered carport, and a landscaped entryway with palm trees and shrubs. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard features a swimming pool, a paved patio area, and mature trees for shade and privacy. The property is bordered by a paved walkway and additional landscaping, including tall coniferous trees along the perimeter. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brown brick exterior, large windows, a driveway, carport, and a backyard pool surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and mature tree, highlighting the rear facade and outdoor living area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the house with the driveway, two parked cars, and tall trees lining the property edge.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the house, featuring the main entryway, carport, driveway, and landscaped entry with palm trees.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the opposite side of the house, with additional landscaping, tall coniferous trees, and a clear view of the flat roof and side windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered carport, paved steps, landscaped approach, and a modern door with minimal decorative elements.
